creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
ed          2008-06-19 07:52:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository (src committer)

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt/annextools  Makefile pkg-plist 
    net-mgmt/annextools/files patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  Don't install rtelnet when sgtty is not available anymore.
  
  rtelnet cannot easily be ported to the termios interface without
  performing very thorough tests. We'd better not risk it and disconnect
  rtelnet from the build when sgtty is not available. We can always
  restore it when someone offers a patch.
  
  PR:             124473
  Approved by:    philip (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.8       +12 -2     ports/net-mgmt/annextools/Makefile
  1.2       +3 -1      ports/net-mgmt/annextools/files/patch-Makefile
  1.2       +1 -1      ports/net-mgmt/annextools/pkg-plist
